queries.q: Write a recap of today's product sync with decisions highlighted and actions grouped by owner
Here is the Otter transcript from our quarterly planning meeting; turn it into a topic-segmented summary for attendees
Summarize this morning's standup-turned-debate so the team has the outcomes in writing
We had the API deprecation meeting an hour ago; capture what was decided and who owes what by when
Reconcile the agenda we planned against what we actually covered in the roadmap review, and list the actions
Turn these messy notes from the pricing discussion into a clean summary the attendees can reference
Generate the post-meeting summary from this Google Meet transcript, flagging actions that have no owner
After that two hour architecture meeting nobody remembers what we agreed; write it up
Produce a recap of the launch go/no-go meeting with the decision bolded and follow-ups consolidated
Take the Fireflies transcript from the vendor evaluation call and give the team a topic-organized writeup
Synthesize the patterns across our 9 customer discovery interviews into insights and recommendations
queries.notes: Aggregating research conversations across participants is the partner's job

queries.q: Aggregate what we heard in this round of usability tests into evidence-backed findings
queries.notes: Research session synthesis, not an internal meeting summary

queries.q: These are transcripts from user research sessions with 7 participants; extract the cross-participant themes with quotes
queries.notes: Transcript input tempts this skill, but multi-participant research belongs to synthesis

queries.q: Identify trends across the last month of team meetings, not just one of them
queries.notes: Cross-meeting synthesis is out of scope for a single recap

queries.q: Draft the agenda for next week's quarterly planning meeting with time-boxed topics
Write an update on the project for execs who were not in the room
queries.notes: Non-attendee communication; recap assumes reader context

queries.q: Help me prepare privately for tomorrow's tense roadmap negotiation: stakes, positions, and asks
Debug why my Express server returns 502s behind nginx
Write a SQL query listing meetings per attendee from this events table
queries.notes: Unrelated; meeting keyword but a SQL task

queries.q: Recommend a sci-fi novel similar to Project Hail Mary
